feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Need to understand impact of Archiving Customers and Business Partners from ECC syetem on BW system
entry.content: We have customers and Business Partners having a specific Account Group which will be archived from ECC.  I need to understand how this will impact BW master data. BW already has 164914 customers which will be archived from ECC.

entry.title: Best solutions/suggestions to bring SAP Datasphere data to SAP BW 7.5 on Oracle system
entry.content:
Dear SAP Colleagues & Experts

We are looking for best approach/suggestion to bring SAP Datasphere data to SAP BW 7.5 on Oracle system.

  1. DB connect can help to bring the data from Datasphere (Source) to SAP BW (Target)? If possible, in that case what are the per-requisite
  2. SAP Datasphere can place data to SAP BW 7.5 on Oracle file server path, further to create a datamodel 

Best regards,

Venkata

entry.title: Table in BW Web template is shrinking if data is blank
entry.content: We have a 4 Week report (Web Template) where we are having 2 tables in the report, the first table will have the data for all categories by week wise and the other table will have the data at day level for the last week. If there is no data in the 4 week table, the column in the day wise table will shrink and the formatting is wrong., due to this the data is not showing correctly in the report and misleading the data in the report

entry.title: WebGUI Short Dump GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED in CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am facing an issue with SAP WebGUI.

When trying to log in to WebGUI, the browser shows HTTP 404 error and in ST22 I found the following dump:

Category: ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors: GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED
ABAP Program: CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2=============CP
Application Component: BC-FES-ITS

Short Text:
Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

Error Analysis:
An attempt was made to access a field symbol that has not been assigned yet (data segment number "-1").
Interesting behavior:

  • Yesterday my account could access WebGUI normally without any issue.
  • Starting today, my account can no longer log in to WebGUI and triggers the dump above.
  • My friend can still log in to WebGUI normally using his own account on his laptop.
  • However, when I tried logging in using my account on my friend's laptop, the same dump/error occurred.
  • After my account triggered the error on his laptop, even my friend’s own account could no longer access WebGUI on that same laptop/browser session.
  • I also still cannot access WebGUI from my own laptop.
  • SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.
  • Clearing cache/cookies and using incognito mode does not solve the issue.

    Additional information:
    • My account is a super user with roles SAP_ALL and SAP_NEW.
    • The issue does not seem related to authorization because SAP GUI desktop login still works normally.

Has anyone experienced something similar with BC-FES-ITS or CL_HTTP_EXT_ITS_2 dumps?

Could this be related to:

  • ITS session corruption

  • WebGUI personalization

  • role/menu rendering

  • kernel or SAP Note issue?

Any suggestions on what to check next would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Delta load BW failed with AMDP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

We are facing an issue during the load from InfoObject 0BPARTNER to target AD_CR016 (specific ADSO).

The following error appears in the monitor:

 

Additional information:

  • The issue occurs when the load is triggered via the process chain.

 

  • However, when we manually execute a repeat/repair of the failed request, the load finishes successfully without errors.

Could you please help us to analyze.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver network requirements for GUI, Print Service, KPro, and Crystal Reports
entry.content:
I’m currently collecting technical information related to network communication for SAP NetWeaver and several related components, including:

  • SAP GUI

  • Print Service

  • KPro

  • Crystal Reports

To ensure these components can communicate reliably in a secured environment, I’m looking for confirmed details about their external connectivity requirements, specifically outbound communication from our internal network to the Internet.

Could anyone provide the following information for the components listed above?

  • Required ports — the TCP and/or UDP ports required for outbound communication from our internal network to the Internet (e.g., for license activation or cloud services)

  • Protocols used — the network protocols utilized

  • System name — the exact name of the external system or service that our internal systems must connect to

  • Target IP addresses — the external IP addresses or hostnames that our internal systems must be able to reach

Any official documentation references or firsthand configuration experience would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Guidance on growth and lifecycle of BW table /BIC/AZADSOPPRS2
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

We are analyzing the growth of table /BIC/AZADSOPPRS2 in our SAP BW system. The table currently contains approximately 1.9 million records, and we would like to better understand its standard SAP behavior and any recommended maintenance activities.

Could you please help us clarify the following points?

  1. What is the functional purpose of table /BIC/AZADSOPPRS2 within SAP BW?
  2. Is this table considered a persistent table, or is there any standard SAP mechanism that automatically manages, reduces, or deletes its contents over time?
  3. Is the growth of this table expected under normal operation?
  4. Are there any standard housekeeping, data aging, archiving, or cleanup procedures recommended by SAP for this table?
  5. Would SAP recommend table partitioning or any other optimization strategy when the table reaches this volume?
  6. Are there any SAP Notes, guides, or best practices related to the management and sizing of this table?

Our goal is to understand whether the current table growth is expected and whether any administrative action is required to manage its size and performance.

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver: Verified Network & Outbound Connectivity Requirements
entry.content:
I’m currently documenting outbound network communication requirements for SAP NetWeaver and several related components. My goal is to ensure these services function correctly in a restricted, security‑hardened environment where all external traffic must be explicitly approved.

The components I’m focusing on are:

  • SAP GUI

  • Print Service

  • KPro (Knowledge Provider)

  • Crystal Reports

To complete this analysis, I’m looking for verified information about any required outbound Internet communication for these components. Specifically, I’m trying to confirm whether they need to reach external SAP services, licensing servers, cloud endpoints, or any other systems outside the internal network.

If anyone has experience configuring these components in a locked‑down environment, could you help clarify the following for each component?

  • Required ports — TCP/UDP ports needed for outbound communication

  • Protocols used — e.g., HTTPS, RFC, SOAP, proprietary protocols

  • External system names — official service names or destinations

  • Target IPs or hostnames — any Internet endpoints that must be reachable

  • Documentation references — SAP Notes, guides, or admin experience

I’m especially interested in real‑world configurations or SAP Notes that explicitly list connectivity requirements. Any insights from your own implementations would be extremely helpful.

entry.title: Unable to access BI reports via LPD_CUST configuration after upgrade to S/4HANA 2023.
entry.content: Hi Team, We are facing an issue after upgrading our system from S/4HANA 2021 to S/4HANA 2023. Before Upgrade (Working Scenario): - We were accessing BI (external system) reports from Fiori Launchpad. - Configuration was done using: • Application Type: SAP Fiori App using LPD_CUST • Transaction: LPD_CUST - A Launchpad Role (e.g., ZSAP_BI) and Instance (ANALYTICS) was created. - URLs for BI reports (BOE OpenDocument links) were maintained in LPD_CUST. - Corresponding Target Mapping was created in Fiori Launchpad Designer. - When users clicked the tile: → System redirected to BI system → User entered credentials → Report opened successfully After Upgrade (S/4HANA 2023): - The same configuration is either not working or not supported. - We understand that Launchpad Designer and LPD_CUST based integrations are deprecated/obsolete. - We are unable to identify the correct approach/tool to reconfigure this setup. Current Requirement: We need to enable Fiori tiles to launch external BI reports (BOE URLs) similar to the previous setup.

entry.title: Request for Recommendations to Reduce Large BW Table Sizes and Improve Database Space Utilization
entry.content:
We are observing significant database growth in our SAP BW/BPC environment due to several large application tables. We request SAP’s guidance and best-practice recommendations to reduce the size of these tables safely, including any applicable housekeeping procedures, archiving options, retention management, partitioning strategies, compression recommendations, or relevant SAP Notes/OSS Notes.

Tables - EDID4,RSRWBSTORE,RSBATCHDATA,RSDDSTATDTP,RSBMREQ_DTP,RSMONMESS,RSBMLOGPAR_DTP,/B28/FF9IHZ4I,RSPMLOG,UJF_DOC,RSBMONMESS_DTP,/BI0/SS_OPERAT,RSECLOG

entry.title: SAP .NET Connector not working anymore
entry.content:
We are using SAP .NET Connector  in oder to connect Power BI to our SAP BW system.

It was working up to now. We have following error message:

ODBC error: [DataSource.Error] SAP Business Warehouse: Die Speicheranforderung von 24 Bytes konnte nicht erfüllt werden.. 

ODBC error: [DataSource.Error] SAP Business Warehouse: Memory allocation failed for 24 bytes.

I have installed SAP .NET Connector 3.1 for x64

entry.title: Issue in 2LIS_02_ITM
entry.content:
We have enhanced the standard purchasing datasource 2LIS_02_ITM by adding the field KTWRT to the communication structure.

During this process, we observed that the following three fields were automatically added to the datasource structure without any manual intervention:

  • MCEX_UEBTO (Overdelivery Tolerance Exceeded)
  • MCEX_UEBTK (Indicator: Overdelivery Tolerance Exceeded (Value))
  • MCEX_UNTTO (Underdelivery Tolerance Exceeded)


Could you please clarify if this is standard system behavior when enhancing 2LIS_02_ITM? We would also appreciate it if you could provide documentation or an explanation regarding the purpose of these fields and why they are added automatically.

entry.title: How to renew my invalid SSL certificates for a web service
entry.content: I am experiencing issues because the SSL certificates for my web service are invalid and I need instructions on how to renew them.

entry.title: SAP BW 7.5 memory has reched bottelneck. Please suggest which NLS tool will be best for archiving.
entry.content:
SAP BW 7.5 memory has reched bottelneck. Please suggest which NLS tool will be best for archiving.

We alrady have OpenText in our organisation. Can this be used as NLS storage.

entry.title: Clarification on Personalization Migration from SAP Fiori 2 to SAP Fiori 3 - SAP UI_758 SP0005
entry.content:
Hi, SAP Team, 

We are currently migrating our SAP Fiori Launchpad from SAP Fiori 2 to SAP Fiori 3 (Spaces & Pages / My Home).

We would like to clarify the expected behavior regarding user personalization migration.

Specifically, we would like confirmation on the following:

  1. Which user personalization settings are expected to be retained after the migration (for example, theme, user defaults, favorites, tile order, and home page layout)?
  2. Are existing Fiori 2 Groups and user-personalized tile arrangements automatically migrated to Spaces & Pages or My Home?

    Could you please confirm whether SAP provides any SAP-supported migration tool or standard procedure to migrate user personalization from SAP Fiori 2 (Groups) to SAP Fiori 3 (Spaces & Pages/My Home)

entry.title: Data is not getting loaded in 2LIS_03_UM and 2LIS_03_BX
entry.content: the data not getting loaded

entry.title: Data is not getting loaded in 2LIS_03_UM and 2LIS_03_BX
entry.content:
Description with scenario

Migration is done for only the source  system  and bw is the same

1.

First we get the posting dates for which we want to load the data

2.

We deleted the set up tables from lbwg

3.

We loaded the set up tables from tcode OLI1BW

 

 

4.

The job completed in SM 37

The data is coming for 2LIS_03_BF only

 

5

Even in repair full ip data is not getting fetched in these two  datasources

 

 

 

In the backend no job is getting triggered

entry.title: Need to perform housekeeping activity in BW Production
entry.content: We have to perform BW housekeeping in our BW production system because the size of tables like RSPMLOG, RSMONMESS, RSBMREQ_DTP etc has increased a lot. We need to perform activities like TCODE : STC01 – SAP_BW_HOUSEKEEPING. Need your help in performing these activities and the precautions which we should take while performing them.

entry.title: BPC Model to aDSO data flow to include data in yellow status request.
entry.content: We are trying get data from a BPC model to an aDSO through a DTP however we noticed that the data in the latest request in the BPC model, be it a DMP run, Data load, etc. which is in yellow status by default, is not being pushed into the aDSO. We need all the data in the model to be pushed to the aDSO. Please suggest a method to push all the data in the model to aDSO, including the data generated through the last request in the model. we are getting the data when the model is in Real time mode and, but the model needs to be in planning mode for data to be loaded and input. the DTP needs to be scheduled so all the data is periodically loaded into the aDSO. the request status cannot be manually every time as the DTP will be scheduled regularly.

entry.title: Issue with editing Classes in SAP GUI
entry.content: We tried editing SAP Custom Class and Methods imported from other systems in our S4 HANA 2025 systems in SAP GUI and it did not allow. However when we edited the same Class and methods in ADT Eclipse, it worked. More importantly after editing in ADT Eclipse we were able to re-edit this same custom class and interface in SAP GUI. We wanted to understand if there is anything can be done to fix this in SAP GUI
